posts.author: mayarz (Maya Ron zohar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi,
I couldn’t find the combination of sorting options that will give me the result of filtering a view by groups, still see the empty groups, and also choose the specific groups I want to show.

If I click on “group by” there is the option to “show empty groups” but once I click it, it overrides my filter and shows all the empty groups on my main table.

What are you trying to achieve

The feature that I’m asking for already exist, I just need it to apply to the “filter” option as well.
